title: Pledge and dedication of tax irrepealable and irrevocable
doc_html:
§1110.  Pledge and dedication of tax irrepealable and irrevocable

The pledge and dedication of the tax shall be irrepealable and irrevocable by any authority whatsoever until the bonds have been paid in principal and interest.
doc_text:
§1110.  Pledge and dedication of tax irrepealable and irrevocable
The pledge and dedication of the tax shall be irrepealable and irrevocable by any authority whatsoever until the bonds have been paid in principal and interest.
